Package com.sun.identity.console.session.model

Class SMSessionData

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.sun.identity.console.session.model.SMSessionData
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable
    public class SMSessionData
extends Object
implements Serializable
    Class that provides methods to set/get session data.
    See Also:
